subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest the Most Exalted Concourse, render thanks unto the Self-Subsisting Lord, that thou hast been granted and confirmed with such a bounty that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مطاف ملا اعلی شکر کن حضرت قیوم را که بچنین بخششی موفق و موید شدی که
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @firmness in the Covenant
